front: What are the three main windowing strategies in Dataflow and when would you use each?
back: Tumbling (fixed) windows divide time into non-overlapping equal buckets (e.g., hourly counts). Sliding windows overlap: a 1-hour window every 15 minutes gives a rolling metric. Session windows group events by inactivity gap: a new window starts after a configurable idle period, useful for user session analytics. Gotcha: session windows are per-key, so each user gets independent session boundaries, not a global one.
